# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 24 — Total Tax (2025)

> Re-authored 2026-06-14. Source of truth: `lines/24.md`.

---

## Formula

```
Form1040.line24 = Form1040.line22 + Form1040.line23
```

Implementation convention:

```
Form1040.line24 = nz(Form1040.line22) + nz(Form1040.line23)
```

Storage convention: **ZERO-when-zero** — `totalTax` is **never null**. Either positive value or `BigDecimal.ZERO`. The PDF cell shows "0" or the positive amount, never blank.

Reference implementation (`TaxReturnComputeService.java:26968-26971`):

```java
// Line 24 = line22 + line23 (other taxes from Schedule 2).
BigDecimal line23 = safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes());
BigDecimal line24 = roundMoney(line22.add(line23));
tac.setTotalTax(line24.compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0 ? line24 : BigDecimal.ZERO);
```

No additional floor on line 24 beyond the line 22 floor and the structural non-negativity of line 23.

---

## Inputs to Line 24

Line 24 = `nz(line22) + nz(line23)`. Both inputs must be finalized before `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` runs at main flow line ~2067.

### Direct inputs

| Input | Java field | Java getter | Computed by | Storage convention |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Line 22 — tax after nonrefundable credits | `TaxAndCredits.taxAfterCredits` | `getTaxAfterCredits()` | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` itself (3 lines earlier) | ALWAYS-SET (never null; PDF shows "0") |
| Line 23 — other taxes (Schedule 2 line 21) | `TaxAndCredits.otherTaxes` | `getOtherTaxes()` | `finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()` (runs before `computeLine20ThroughLine24`) | null-when-zero — coerced via `safeAmount(...)` |

### Indirect inputs feeding line 22

| Input | Java field | Computed by |
|---|---|---|
| Line 18 — total tax before credits | `TaxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `computeLine18()` (= line 16 + line 17) |
| Line 21 — total nonrefundable credits | `TaxAndCredits.totalCredits` | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` (same method, 4 lines earlier) |

---

## Storage Convention — ZERO-when-zero (unique among neighbors)

| Line | Field | When zero |
|---|---|---|
| 20 | `otherCreditsSchedule3` | null |
| 21 | `totalCredits` | null |
| 22 | `taxAfterCredits` | `BigDecimal.ZERO` (always-set, no null check) |
| 23 | `otherTaxes` | null (set only when grandTotal > 0) |
| **24** | **`totalTax`** | **`BigDecimal.ZERO` (zero-when-zero ternary at setter)** |

Rationale: total tax is the return's marquee value. A blank cell would be ambiguous (was zero computed? was the line skipped?). Literal "0" makes the answer explicit.

The line 22 and line 24 zero-storage choices coexist with the line 20/21/23 null-when-zero choice inside the **same method** — three conventions in adjacent lines of code.

---

## Output

| Output | Java field | Setter | Value when zero |
|---|---|---|---|
| Line 24 — total tax | `TaxAndCredits.totalTax` | `setTotalTax(BigDecimal)` | `BigDecimal.ZERO` (never null) |

---

## Downstream Consumers of `TaxAndCredits.totalTax` (line 24)

| Consumer | How used | Location |
|---|---|---|
| `computeLine31ThroughLine38()` | Reads `tac.getTotalTax()` as basis for refund vs. amount-owed comparison against line 33 (total payments); drives `line34 = max(0, line33 - line24)` overpayment and `line37 = max(0, line24 - line33)` amount-owed pivots | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:~27275-27278` |
| `computeForm2210()` | Does **NOT** read `totalTax` directly. Reconstructs from components: Part I line 1 = `getTaxAfterCredits()` (line 22, **G3 fix 2026-04-19**) + line 2 = `getOtherTaxes()` (line 23, **G7 fix**) → line 3 = line 1 + line 2 (structurally = line 24) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27562-27576` (lock-in test at `TaxReturnComputeServiceTest.java:22631`) |
| Frontend `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | PDF fill `line24_total_tax` | line 329 |
| Frontend `shell.component.ts` | Summary display: `const taxTotal = tax?.['totalTax']` | ~line 887 |
| Frontend `form-tax-return-schedule2.component.ts` | Schedule 2 Part I line 3 PDF fill | ~line 145 |
| Frontend `form-alt-fuel-credit.component.ts` | Imports from Schedule 2: `this.importedSchedule2 = this.num(schedule2?.tax?.totalTax)` | ~line 387 |
| Frontend `form-bond-credit.component.ts` | Imports from Schedule 2 | ~line 292 |

---

## Form 2210 Reads Components, Not Line 24

Form 2210 Part I reconstructs the current-year tax from its components rather than reading line 24:

```java
// TaxReturnComputeService.java:27562-27576
BigDecimal l1 = safeAmount(form1040.getTaxAndCredits().getTaxAfterCredits());   // line 22 (G3 fix)
f.setCurrentYearTax(l1);
BigDecimal l2 = safeAmount(form1040.getTaxAndCredits().getOtherTaxes());        // line 23 (G7 fix)
f.setOtherTaxes(l2);
BigDecimal l3 = l1.add(l2);                                                     // structurally = line 24
f.setCombinedTax(l3);
```

| Gap | Before fix | After fix |
|---|---|---|
| G3 (line 22 source) | Read `totalTaxBeforeCredits` (line 18) — overstated penalty base | Reads `taxAfterCredits` (line 22) |
| G7 (line 23 source) | Hardcoded zero — understated penalty base | Reads `otherTaxes` (line 23) |

Both gaps closed 2026-04-19.

---

## PDF Field Mapping

| Line | PDF semantic key | AcroForm field | Page |
|---|---|---|---|
| 22 | `line22_tax_less_credits` | `f2_14[0]` | 2 |
| 23 | `line23_other_taxes_schedule2_line21` | `f2_15[0]` | 2 |
| **24** | **`line24_total_tax`** | **`f2_16[0]`** | **2** |

CSV source: `C:\us-tax\us-tax-ui\public\irs\f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv`.

Because line 24 is ZERO-when-zero, the PDF cell always renders a number (literal "0" or positive).

---

## Compute Order

```
[Lines 1-15: income / deductions / AGI / taxable income]
computeLine16()                       → regular tax + Form 8814 + Form 4972 + §962 etc.
computeLine17() + buildForm8959()     → AMT
computeLine18()                       → sets tac.totalTaxBeforeCredits = line 16 + line 17
computeSchedule8812()                 → sets tac.childTaxCredit (line 19)
applyXxxToSchedule3() [all credit forms]
finalizeSchedule3Totals()             → sets Schedule3 line 8 (consumed as line 20)
finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()         → sets tac.otherTaxes (line 23) — runs BEFORE computeLine20ThroughLine24
computeLine20ThroughLine24() {
    line20 = Schedule3.line8                                     (null-when-zero)
    line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)                             (null-when-zero)
    line22 = max(0, nz(line18) - nz(line21))                    (always-set; floor at 0)
    line23 = safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes())                     (already finalized; null → 0)
    line24 = line22 + line23                                     ← THIS LINE
    tac.setTotalTax(line24 > 0 ? line24 : BigDecimal.ZERO)      (zero-when-zero)
}
computeLine31ThroughLine38()          → reads tac.getTotalTax() (line 24) for line 33 / 34 / 37
computeForm2210()                     → reads line 22 + line 23 components separately (G3 + G7)
```

Call site: `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26968`.

---

## Guardrails (from lines/24.md §7)

| Rule | Mechanism |
|---|---|
| `line24 = line22 + line23` only — pure addition, no extra adjustments | structural |
| `line24 >= 0` | guaranteed: line 22 ≥ 0 by floor; line 23 ≥ 0 by IRS construction |
| `line24 >= line22` and `line24 >= line23` | both addends non-negative → sum dominates each |
| `line24` is ZERO-when-zero (never null) | ternary at setter |
| Line 24 is NOT reduced by payments / refundable credits | payments begin at line 25 (after line 24) |
| Line 24 can equal line 22 when line 23 = 0 | common case — no Schedule 2 Part II activity |
| Line 24 can be positive when line 22 = 0 | credits absorb regular tax but Schedule 2 Part II taxes still due |

### Critical edge case (line 22 = 0, line 23 > 0)

Credits can eliminate regular tax while leaving Additional Medicare Tax, NIIT, household employment tax, or other Schedule 2 Part II taxes still due. In this case:

```
line22 = 0  (credits absorb line 18)
line23 > 0  (e.g., Form 8960 NIIT)
line24 = line23 > 0
```

The line 24 ZERO-when-zero convention is exercised primarily when **both** line 22 and line 23 are zero.

---

## Drives Refund / Owed Pivot

Line 24 is the most consequential single value on the return. Every downstream payment, refund, amount-owed, and underpayment-penalty calculation reads from it:

```
Form1040.line25d = line25a + line25b + line25c          (federal withholding)
Form1040.line33  = line25d + line26 + line32            (total payments)
Form1040.line34  = max(0, line33 - line24)              (overpayment / refund pivot)
Form1040.line37  = max(0, line24 - line33)              (amount-owed pivot)
```

The line 24 value is what the comparison `line33 vs line24` uses to decide refund vs. balance due.

---

`TaxReturnComputeServiceTest.java`:

| Test | Assertion |
|---|---|
| `form2210Line1UsesTaxAfterCreditsNotTotalTaxBeforeCredits` (line 22631) | Lock-in for G3 fix — Form 2210 Part I line 1 reads line 22, not line 18 |
| Various smoke / scenario tests | `getTotalTax()` non-null; arithmetic correct on full-stack scenarios |

## E2E Test Coverage

`e2e/tests/line24-total-tax.spec.ts` (created 2026-04-19):

| Test | Scenario |
|---|---|
| Normal path | `totalTax == taxAfterCredits` when line 23 = 0 |
| Edge case | `taxAfterCredits == 0, otherTaxes == 500, totalTax == 500` (line 22 = 0 / line 23 > 0 edge) |

---

## Scope Boundaries

### In scope (fully implemented for 2025)

- Formula `nz(line22) + nz(line23)` — correct and complete
- Null safety: `safeAmount()` on both inputs; result stored as at least `BigDecimal.ZERO`
- PDF fill `line24_total_tax` → `f2_16[0]`
- Downstream consumer `computeLine31ThroughLine38()` correctly reads `getTotalTax()`
- Form 2210 reads components (line 22 + line 23) via G3 + G7 fixes

### Gaps

None outstanding. Historical G1 (Form 2210 reading wrong source) and G2 (missing e2e spec) both closed 2026-04-19; doc-drift resolved 2026-05-15.
